name: Porites sp. Geochemical Time Series from Tiarei-A1, Tahiti (2008)
description: This dataset contains high-resolution geochemical measurements from a Porites sp. coral core collected at Tiarei-A1, Tahiti. The data includes elemental ratios (Sr/Ca, Mg/Ca) and stable isotope ratios (δ18O, δ13C) recorded at a daily temporal resolution for July 2008. The dataset provides precise geographic coordinates and elevation for the sampling site, linking the geochemical proxies to specific environmental conditions.
